nodes.label: Redis Client Sentinel - Master/Replica Configuration  This module provides a Red
Redis client implementation with master/replica support for high availability.
Get the current connection status of both master and replica clients.
Get Redis configuration from environment variables.
Initializes the Redis master and replica clients.
Returns the master Redis client instance for backward compatibility.
Get the master client for write operations.
Get the replica client for read operations.
Checks if the Redis connections are alive and reconnects if necessary.
Check if both master and replica Redis connections are healthy.
Sets a value in Redis with an optional expiration time.
Sets a value in Redis only if the key does not exist (NX option) with optional e
Gets a value from Redis using the replica client for read operations.
Checks if a key exists in Redis using the replica client for read operations.
Sets an expiration time for a Redis key.
Adds a value to the end of a Redis list.
Trims a Redis list to the specified range.
Retrieves a range of elements from a Redis list using the replica client.
Adds members to a Redis sorted set with their scores.
Removes and returns the members with the lowest scores from a Redis sorted set.
Creates a Redis queue by ensuring the key exists.
Adds a JSON object to the end of the Redis queue.
Pops a JSON object from the start of the Redis queue.
Returns the size of the Redis queue.
Retrieves a value from Redis based on its key using the replica client.
Get Redis queue name for an organisation.
Get Redis counter key for an organisation.
Get Redis daily counter key for an organisation.
Get the Redis lock key for a resource.
Get organisations from cached config manager.
Get specific organisation config with caching.
Create a queue for an organisation if it doesn't exist.
Add a job to an organisation's queue.
Get a job from an organisation's queue.
Get the length of an organisation's queue.
Decrement an organisation's job counter, ensuring it doesn't go below 0.
Increment an organisation's daily job counter.
Decrement the system-wide job counter, ensuring it doesn't go below 0.
Get an organisation's job counter value.
Get an organisation's daily job counter value.
Get the system-wide job counter value.
Check if an organisation is under its concurrency limit.
Check if an organisation is under its daily limit.
Check if the system is under its concurrency limit.
Increment both system and organisation counters in a single transaction.
Decrement both system and organisation counters in a single transaction.
Check if an organisation is under its limits.
Get current counter values for an organisation.
Get organisations that can process more jobs.
Scan Redis keys matching a pattern using the replica client for read operations.
